====Pokémon Generations====
[[File:Calem PG.png|thumb|250px|Calem in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Calem appeared in ''[[PG18|The Redemption]]'', where he was seen at the parade in [[Lumiose City]] after he had become the {{pkmn|Champion}} of [[Kalos]]. During the parade, he was challenged by [[AZ]], whom he battled and defeated.

Much like the other [[player character]]s depicted in [[Pokémon Generations]], Calem doesn't have any lines of dialogue.
